Kelly Ayotte is considering a rematch

Hi there,
In 2016, Maggie Hassan beat Republican Senator Kelly Ayotte by just _1,017 votes._ **It was the most competitive Senate race of the cycle.**
Now Maggie is up for reelection, and experts are saying that Ayotte is considering a rematch.
Republicans are eyeing this seat because they know that flipping New Hampshire is their best chance at taking back the majority. We won't mince words: we need your help to keep this seat -- and the Senate -- blue:

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Liberals Hate Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The political establishment is determined to crush
conservatives everywhere and erase the values that make America
great. And sadly, very few people in Washington are willing to
fight back.

That's what makes Senator Josh Hawley's bold and
principled leadership so important.

The junior senator from Missouri's decision to
object to the election results showed tremendous courage. It
brought him instant scorn from the media and even a public rebuke
from his own Senate leader.

Even worse, Senator Hawley's decision to give voice
to the concerns held by millions of Americans brought protestors
to his own home to harass his wife and newborn child.

And now Simon & Schuster, the publisher of his
upcoming book, has decided to cancel his contract because he
dared to stand up for liberty and fight for election integrity.

It's a "direct assault on the First Amendment," said
Hawley. "This is the Left looking to cancel everyone they don't
approve of. I will fight this cancel culture with everything I
have."

He's right to fight it, and conservatives should
stand shoulder-to-shoulder with him in defending our cherished
values.

We're going to support Senator Hawley by
contributing to Senator Hawley's campaign today.

Please join us by making your own donation to back
this courageous conservative!

The progressive Left may think they have defeated
us, but millions of Americans believe in limited government,
economic freedom, and traditional values.

We will continue to support conservative leaders
like Josh Hawley and do everything we can to secure America's
future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

SUPPORT JOSH HAWLEY

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

I must be able to defend myself against these nasty smear tactics and show that you and I and the America First agenda are not going anywhere! Make no mistake, the Radical Left, led by AOC and the Squad, are trying to remove me from office for defending President Trump. And as President Trump's biggest supporter, I've become Enemy #1. But in reality, they're not after me. They're after you. I'm just in their way. I must fight back. I must have the resources to defend myself in the public sphere. Will you stand with me? Chip in $15, $25, $50, $100, $1,000 -- whatever you can afford -- right away. As a Christian, a wife, a mother of three, and a small business owner, I ran for Congress to support President Trump and his America First policies. And now I'm under constant assault from the most radical socialists in Washington, D.C. In fact, on top of Democrats trying to remove me from office, the Fake News writes nonstop hit pieces, and the Silicon Valley Cartel is always trying to shut me down. But I will not be intimidated or silenced because I have the support of you, the people! If you stand with me, please, chip in with whatever you can afford. Every bit helps me fight back through email, text messages, phone calls and even social media (when I'm not censored!). Even if it's just $10, every dollar goes a long way. Thanks so much. I will keep you updated. -- Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) Paid for by Greene for Congress This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. name: Chuck Rocha
subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
In the 2020 election, Democrats lost massive ground with Latino voters. Thankfully we beat Trump, but we cannot let the victory paper over that troubling trend.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24382353/270530240/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxNDJkZGZkLTU4NjItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLK2LNP8BdXn__iiX8LXs70UxaFhCLqaKjL-vFrb0Gw=)

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to Nuestro PAC to help us continue our critical work in the months ahead. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
In the 2020 election, Democrats lost massive ground with Latino voters. Thankfully we beat Trump, but we cannot let the victory paper over that troubling trend.
Because the truth is, Latino voters are the largest emerging voting bloc in America. Win them, Democrats will win increasing control and have the chance to enact a progressive agenda. Lose them, and we will get Republican control for decades to come.
On Bernie’s campaign, we wrote the playbook on how to communicate with, persuade, and turn out Latino voters — work we will continue with Nuestro PAC in the issue and electoral fights ahead.
But I can’t do it alone. We raised $6 million last cycle, including hundreds of thousands of dollars from small-donations. Now I’m counting on you to keep our movement growing. So I am asking:
**[Can you make a contribution to Nuestro PAC - of any amount you can afford - to help us organize Latino voters in support of a progressive agenda and progressive candidates in the cycle ahead?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24382354/270530241/1999088365?refcode=em210128-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxNDJkZGZkLTU4NjItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLK2LNP8BdXn__iiX8LXs70UxaFhCLqaKjL-vFrb0Gw=)**
It is hard to overstate the importance of this work, and it is no stretch to suggest that the future of Democratic Party politics depends on our success. Those are the stakes, and it’s why I am devoting myself fully to this fight.
Thanks for helping make it a success. It means a lot to me.
Chuck Rocha

# **Top Republican in NYS Senate calls on health commissioner to quit**
---
| | By Bernadette Hogan and Bruce Golding | January 28, 2021

(via NYPOST)

New York state’s health commissioner should resign in disgrace over the bombshell allegation that his department has under-reported nursing home deaths from COVID-19 by more than 50 percent, the top Republican in the state Senate said Thursday. Dr. Howard Zucker committed “a gross dereliction of duty in the middle of the worst public health crisis that perhaps we have seen in our lifetime,” Senate Minority Leader Robert Ortt (R-Lockport) said. During an afternoon conference call with reporters, Ortt called Zucker “the face of the Department of Health.” “He is out there in all the public commercials encouraging people to get the vaccine,” Ortt said. “How can he lead when we’ve got this report that shows he lied to the people of New York?” Ortt also said that he and other Republicans had been seeking the data that state Attorney General Letitia James, a Democrat, released in a report earlier in the day. “These numbers have been called for and asked for months,” Ortt said. “That is not a missed data point. That is not an error. That is a deliberate attempt to mislead the people.” Ortt said he “would welcome” the support of state Senate Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins (D-Yonkers) in seeking Zucker’s resignation, adding: “I certainly would encourage her and her conference to do their jobs.”

**[READ MORE](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3ced4652d6&e=9f843ba602)**

clean_body: | | | Derek, We have to look at the facts: conspiracy theorist Amanda Chase is the frontrunner for the Republican nomination for Virginia Governor. She raised more money than any other Virginia GOP gubernatorial candidate in the second half of 2020 and she’s showing no signs of slowing down. | Come November, we can’t have any regrets or wish we had done more at the beginning of the year to stop this Trump loyalist from winning. Hitting every goal we set as a campaign is the only way we can ensure we have the resources to keep Amanda Chase out of the Governor’s office. | | | | I appreciate you. \-- Terry Paid for by Terry for Virginia | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20IN=20GOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Fwd: Dems are targeting Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Fwd: We need to start NOW to keep Indiana RED in 2022 and beyond! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470198?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Hoosier Republican,

I’m reaching out because I want to make sure you saw our team’s recent email. It is so important that we build a strong foundation for future success, and we can’t do it without you.

If we fail to keep Indiana RED in 2022, there is ZERO chance we will be able to take back the Senate or the House. It’s critical that we win a majority in Congress during the midterms so we can STOP Joe Biden’s ultra-progressive agenda and save America!

We’re asking every single Hoosier to chip in just a few dollars before our fundraising deadline at midnight on January 31st. It’s our first major goalpost since Biden took office, and we want to send a STRONG message that we’re not resting on our laurels in Indiana!
CHIP IN NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

I know we can get 100 percent participation. Every single dollar counts in the fight to restore common sense in the United States — no donation is too small.

Help us show the Dems that they will not defeat us.

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman

Sent: Wednesday, January 27, 2021; 9:00 A.M.
From: Indiana GOP
To: Top Supporters
Subject: Dems are targeting Indiana
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

The Democrats are now in charge of the White House, the Senate, and the House, but we cannot let them continue their control past the 2022 midterm elections.

It’s CRITICAL that we send a strong message right NOW, before they have a chance to do irreparable damage to our great country. Our first fundraising deadline since the transfer of power is coming up fast at midnight on January 31st!

Will you chip in just $5 or $10 today to show the DC Dems that Indiana Republicans are not going to stand for their radical agenda? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)
CHIP IN $5 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&amount=5&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)
CHIP IN $10 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&amount=10&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Indiana is going to be the left’s number one target over the next two years. They are still hurting from Senator Mike Braun's impressive win in 2018, and Senator Todd Young is up for reelection in 2022.

We must keep this seat RED and do our part to take back the Senate and win BIG in the House. To make that possible, we need everyone to start now to keep the momentum from our 2020 Hoosier wins going!

We can’t be complacent. We need 100 percent involvement. Just $5 makes a huge difference in our fight to keep Indiana red and save America. Please help with what you can today.

Thanks,
Team IN GOP
DONATE NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-ingop-e-eom3-012921?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_ingop_e_eom3_012921&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=3c8fa6a2d7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

**-President Ronald Reagan**

Friend,

President Ronald Reagan's birthday is right around the corner and his wise words have never felt truer!

| | Friends-

Sunday night marks the first major deadline for my campaign since taking the oath of office four weeks ago. I could not have foreseen the events that unfolded in the first month.

As we look to the future the stakes are high. Joe Biden has waged war on American jobs. By rolling back President Trump’s work, he’s giving Communist China a competitive advantage over American workers, raising energy prices and putting an end to our energy independence.

We can’t allow Biden and the Democrats to put us at an economic disadvantage with anyone let alone our top competitors. I’m committed to fighting to protect our energy independence and stopping China and Russia from getting the upper hand, but I need your help.

We have set a goal to raise $15,000 between now and the end of our first month.

body:
With only 48 hours until our critical end of month deadline, we urgently need your help. As it stands, we're $17,918.87 short of our goal and simply aren't raising enough to defend this seat from Pelosi and her campaign war chest.

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: This is our only chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
It's critical we hold the line and keep our Republican State Majorities
Friend,
As a former Iowa State Legislator, I know firsthand that our statehouses are where so many important things happen. And this year, state legislators have even more power than usual with redistricting happening soon.
But, with special elections still in the works, our Republican State Majorities aren't out of the woods just yet. [**We need your help right now to have the resources to maintain our majorities.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y4-JBbhqIM3osMLimZPNZwnGKwDeapsfvUwGNRoiUsNF4WPVdCoodO4sfUbNNykogAbEDep8R4aai3eqOZxvbnGGWeOlrGMKNY06jrtETRgqUSgauuWVbiy5iDEkcrEpLBq20psI46zAcLBY_Tw9FmvkngvWjebpp6tQG5vWGKH3UrJ_-NQkFuf37T_UwnG6I_V3O64stY5PpjlKVkVbnMfHf8BsgKraoWoj-h17xQYJez9JAOi9i-5VZMsfQlPQbp82EX2QjjLt273IjksORRWdMsxOPvNwJ0_O7aIXxsRFQ4CpCTtAFAUnB2xlLiRMgnbiDyoHriKSOr2FdLZDsWqgB_qAb0Y8ILncUpFzaVmugb2_0Wc45G_IvbuW81qKd7vRGbI34sTE8ohA0N2t-AmMxEFWRXM4xL2gdrCyBdrtf_dHbC6I9Eu39RoXA4Ii&c=KpQwQYvpSMFsNATESAfHqyCFwNYIlmqk7l_Ig6YmVbygc-r5MoOvFg==&ch=xBPJpTz-YOlofieYfZsnokjqaCTmBoKjCLNYFhpynJrDuViDzcD4Pg==)
**[**MAKE 4X IMPACT NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y4-JBbhqIM3osMLimZPNZwnGKwDeapsfvUwGNRoiUsNF4WPVdCoodO4sfUbNNykogAbEDep8R4aai3eqOZxvbnGGWeOlrGMKNY06jrtETRgqUSgauuWVbiy5iDEkcrEpLBq20psI46zAcLBY_Tw9FmvkngvWjebpp6tQG5vWGKH3UrJ_-NQkFuf37T_UwnG6I_V3O64stY5PpjlKVkVbnMfHf8BsgKraoWoj-h17xQYJez9JAOi9i-5VZMsfQlPQbp82EX2QjjLt273IjksORRWdMsxOPvNwJ0_O7aIXxsRFQ4CpCTtAFAUnB2xlLiRMgnbiDyoHriKSOr2FdLZDsWqgB_qAb0Y8ILncUpFzaVmugb2_0Wc45G_IvbuW81qKd7vRGbI34sTE8ohA0N2t-AmMxEFWRXM4xL2gdrCyBdrtf_dHbC6I9Eu39RoXA4Ii&c=KpQwQYvpSMFsNATESAfHqyCFwNYIlmqk7l_Ig6YmVbygc-r5MoOvFg==&ch=xBPJpTz-YOlofieYfZsnokjqaCTmBoKjCLNYFhpynJrDuViDzcD4Pg==)**
**Friend, State Republicans are facing an important January 31st fundraising deadline that will be a major factor in whether or not we KEEP seats RED. **
It's critical we hold the line and keep our Republican State Majorities because if we don't, Democrats have promised to:
1. **REDRAW** Congressional districts strategically, so they can obtain **MORE** seats in Congress for Democrats.
2. Give **NANCY PELOSI** a larger majority in Congress, practically guaranteeing her the power of Speaker of the House for many more terms.

clean_body: It's critical we hold the line and keep our Republican State Majorities Friend, As a former Iowa State Legislator, I know firsthand that our statehouses are where so many important things happen. And this year, state legislators have even more power than usual with redistricting happening soon. But, with special elections still in the works, our Republican State Majorities aren't out of the woods just yet. == == Friend, State Republicans are facing an important January 31st fundraising deadline that will be a major factor in whether or not we KEEP seats RED. It's critical we hold the line and keep our Republican State Majorities because if we don't, Democrats have promised to: 1. name: Tim Scott
subject: Media ignores Black Republican Senator Tim Scott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

Did you see this now-deleted tweet from a media coordinator at CNN?

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210129_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046836-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210129_media-ignores-black-republican-senator-tim-scott/)
That's right, CNN conveniently forgot to acknowledge that conservative Republican Tim Scott was the FIRST black Senator elected from the south since reconstruction.

_**Honest mistake? Coincidence? WE KNOW BETTER.**_

_**Could it be that CNN does not want to acknowledge a black, conservative Republican Senator?**_

Friend, this is outrageous, and we cannot allow it to stand.[**Chip in whatever you can afford to stand with Tim and fight back.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/media-my-story/?utm_campaign=20210129_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046836-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210129_media-ignores-black-republican-senator-tim-scott/)

---

CNN and the liberal media refuse to acknowledge Senator Tim Scott because he doesn't fit their narrative about the Republican Party.

They don't want to hear Tim's voice, which offers a fresh perspective on how conservative values can unleash opportunity for all Americans.

We are counting on you, Friend, to stand with Tim and help amplify HIS voice.

| Peter,
We have the RINO Establishment in panic mode.
Hundreds of patriots stood with me at the Wyoming Capitol to call out Liz Cheney and her America-Last policies that serve the interests of her corporate warlords and not the American people.
[We need to send a clear message -> President Trump's America First movement is the guiding doctrine of the real Republican Party - not the corporate crony vision of Liz Cheney, Mitt Romney, and the rest of the RINOs in Washington.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L5xXN58LElC_qNmrmLndeaodnRpmE8OcKhn-od34TqUMyHS0GZkDwdx0lIEZBkcDQzO9nnpH-z4QZUFfoGEdNmm75JSzp6cbONESGfQwkj3sF4fwTzxFcGEvX_Y_4ni1A_5GRFyJK7BhkRDmq-mW_aAqdT-gkvCiTca_i6lbS12yFcjIdgu4TA==&c=Q3azfv2PUfQgTbKW3yukPWtBci_syX6X176czTd4ADa5zAHzV602zw==&ch=V4yCLRED7BozGGzxBE36gZRRHs5MhIwHMY2yWUPFe1LX-poodXvXXA==)

It's my mission to continue the work of President Trump and stick up for the everyday Americans that love our country and just want a fair shake. The D.C. Join me by supporting my mission:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Years in the Making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
After several years of planning and months of recruitment and interviews, it was a great honor to welcome the inaugural class of the Indiana.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470206?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Years in the Making**_
After several years of planning and months of recruitment and interviews, it was a true joy to help kick off the inaugural class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. This has been a long-gestating program that is now underway to grow our party and create meaningful relationships with communities that have not historically been aligned with our party. As we continue to win at every level of government in Indiana, it’s critical that our party attracts new members who are inspired by our message. I’m confident that The Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series will help us achieve even greater heights.

This week also brought the unwelcome but not surprising news that the new presidential administration will pursue a left-wing agenda. In his first few days in office, Joe Biden halted construction of the Keystone Pipeline and border wall. With a stroke of a pen, Biden killed over 10,000 union jobs, weakened our border security, and paved the way for higher gas prices. The president also approved taxpayer-funded abortions, higher insulin prices, and is banning fracking after saying he wouldn’t. We knew this was coming and it just reinforces that our work as Republicans doesn’t stop. Even though there is no election in Indiana this year, we’re laying the groundwork for our future success in 2022 and 2024.

It's clear from the opening days of the new administration that Republicans will need to remain united to fight back against the left-wing agenda. Our ideas are better and our track record is better and together we can put conservative leadership back in charge in Washington DC.

Thanks,
Kyle
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ **Governor Holcomb** had lunch with the inaugural class of the [Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=463cf9d602&e=1acd9bb3d6). It was a great discussion with the class as **Governor Holcomb** is continuing to build One Indiana for All! [\--> Click here to find out more about the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series <\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ee7b41d2a&e=1acd9bb3d6) The legislative session is also well underway, which means the governor is working with legislators to advance his [agenda](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=010b3c6ca6&e=1acd9bb3d6). The governor has a [robust agenda](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=923ab177bf&e=1acd9bb3d6) this year which includes passing an honestly balanced budget, paying down millions of dollars in long term debt, fighting for pregnancy accommodations for expecting mothers, investing more in education and making sure Indiana continues to safely emerge from the pandemic. [\--> Click here to find out more about Governor Holcomb's 2021 Next Level Agenda <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f2dfba935d&e=1acd9bb3d6) To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0258f223b&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=09ced9ef5e&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f221c44b2c&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| _**Protecting the Sanctity of Life**_ Tax payer dollars should never be used to fund abortions, and Republican lawmakers are working hard to ensure safeguards such as the Hyde Amendment will never be repealed. As part of the Democrat party's further shift left, they have taken direct aim at destroying long-standing, bipartisan protections that prevent the federal government from using taxpayer dollars to support abortion procedures. That's why a group of 200 House GOP lawmakers, including **ALL** members of the Indiana Republican delegation, are vowing to protect the sanctity of life by protecting the Hyde Amendment!
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Todd Young at the Diversity Series**_ The first Republican Diversity Leadership class not only heard from Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Governor Eric Holcomb, but they also got to hear from Senator Todd Young. The group discussed different issues, topics, and changes they'd like to see within the Republican Party. The group will continue to hear from different politicians throughout the year.
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[names inspector general](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d62cb5c70f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[helps launch 'Hoosier by Choice' campaign](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42e48b7cc6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[recognizes Holocaust Remembrance Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cdda471575&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[thanks Indiana National Guard](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fa2abbaeda&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[thanks the troops that protected the capital](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=069db0a043&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[announces committee assignments for 117th congress](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=94743ace6c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[pledges to save Hyde](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d93547dc8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[was selected to serve on the House Judiciary Committe](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d5365271a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)[e](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb5f034e46&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[celebrates MLK day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b590505202&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[met with Lincolnland Economic Development Corporation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e7404fd222&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[thanks law enforcement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63541fce24&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
---
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e223f800c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e16a4556d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

That's why a group of 200 House GOP lawmakers, including ALL members of the Indiana Republican delegation, are vowing to protect the sanctity of life by protecting the Hyde Amendment! | | | | Todd Young at the Diversity Series The first Republican Diversity Leadership class not only heard from Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Governor Eric Holcomb, but they also got to hear from Senator Todd Young. The group discussed different issues, topics, and changes they'd like to see within the Republican Party. The group will continue to hear from different politicians throughout the year. | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

subject: quick question
body:
_" America should always welcome immigrants who want to become Americans. But we need laws that decide who and how many people can come here, and those laws must be followed and enforced. There are many issues I think we can work cooperatively with President-elect Biden, but a blanket amnesty for people who are here unlawfully isn't going to be one of them."_
-Senator Marco Rubio

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I've been speaking out about big business' efforts to silence me. The reason is that they could do the same to YOU. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aee749c7a7434529a4252d59e2fa0f9f&_e=d3Es5lbNYMy3qkke-imsgN5Vug4fl2ul1b7HqEiHw23JRUVT0r7Y5NEnFpCdBy8Ado1j4I7I1eys3CO6rUp6yg63juoqnLxyIFZXYBgq8kzrbRDxHskUoxqXDvxj0hKjKMSmXdEkAgqmvY2RzJLIOwe0VCQuqMdhCRrxg5C3W_Fgs3TqqmaCb3rL7_MgWR2Dk-WeY34LhFF64EsZ3Y6BB4U2Bp_f0UDDkcWlfZ1-loSLbBTr6bLBDw6BVJGxL0bA9AfAAqeyE9GCHMgGYiqS4uZ3bOEHUqTOrmDyZFByZqLG_VUqdUoKIoTBAIfiKhkPgUZPvY_Rl0gDrRDGcHRMiHqR7mg2dVlWHCbrFmFJEeE%3D) | |

Peter,
I’ve been speaking out about big business' efforts to silence me. The reason is that they could do the same to **YOU**. They told you the censorship would end when Donald Trump was gone, _but they’re still at it._

Big Tech’s censorship campaign wasn’t a one-time exception. It is, unfortunately, the new reality. They want you to live in fear that if you speak out and say the wrong thing, they’ll shut you up and take away your right to earn a living. **They want you to live in fear.**

**We need to take a stand against cancel culture and censorship. We must stand up for our right to free speech.**

Our founding fathers understood that the right to free speech is God-given — that’s why they put it on the Bill of Rights! Today, I am reaching out to American patriots like **YOU** to help us defend this right, for future generations, before it is lost in ours.

**We still have $23,579 to raise before the end of January.** Please, donate what you can and join me today.
[_**Defend Free Speech in America NOW >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aee749c7a7434529a4252d59e2fa0f9f&_e=d3Es5lbNYMy3qkke-imsgPNJYVAMg8LrNXm7LPlWZasYNz7SUw4DtI38_F9Eo7aLJVBE9DqbSVCPJI83RhP0dOUaA2-RDWY9gOS5ZGqVO4Vvpl-cEX4NMJL2q8ack7-Q15mFNUJwtmBWd5hwRu-POw_KevVjS6JxpJoqxmym_z5WgE9i-pAi6iVdNkcnsnsJq4jq9U61ReCf-Pol7rFOY8tn6iACkhRvi_wafTTBd7XVLvcRXdslYT6u4YdNp6NrcadUeF80IsPKZ6HSmsxYfzC7p7We5yVQinWxxaZOrvpdjw1mUMbDIU4qdH1ekRxp45KYnZLVpOydaFv9-cXqtzu23kbQx88GJyBpww4mVPAuUxxU2ZbtAs2QApCowUqU_AcF2M46i4Q9qvfUz4L60D-1FIggZh2DW2SZCeXiCQ0%3D)
The free speech restrictions and suppression by Twitter, Facebook, Apple, and Google, as well as the latter two platforms’ expulsion of Twitter competitor Parler from their clouds, are all intended to benefit the political left and penalize the political right.

_**We need to stand up to the assault on speech before it’s too late!**_
[**Donate HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aee749c7a7434529a4252d59e2fa0f9f&_e=d3Es5lbNYMy3qkke-imsgPNJYVAMg8LrNXm7LPlWZasYNz7SUw4DtI38_F9Eo7aLJVBE9DqbSVCPJI83RhP0dOUaA2-RDWY9gOS5ZGqVO4Vvpl-cEX4NMJL2q8ack7-Q15mFNUJwtmBWd5hwRu-POw_KevVjS6JxpJoqxmym_z5WgE9i-pAi6iVdNkcnsnsJq4jq9U61ReCf-Pol7rFOY9TQJyeRfTDpHJow-uB6lkTXkmrsXqRknHrB9RDF8ZcARYIlICKe2sg04yWHQ8mXvJ_NRUD3iHIKnFQFudBqV12QBhQzSBBRy6HnzKqYPlsZBPHz5NPS1R5WAR8B74QxbTZiEzZvugkvm6vyMT8tQbA-veIypmSsmk28lX8QRrmz7L1LpJ0u_1Uuvyu2RzcD0cNp8bIXJTYsyLkUBigKK7M%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

Hundreds of thousands of small businesses are gone in an instant, and the worst part is it didn’t have to be this way. Hey Peter, it's Andrew. My team reached out to you earlier this week about the plight that small businesses are currently facing. As someone who comes from a family of small business owners and has worked for small businesses most of my life, I know how hard it is to keep the lights on and the doors open. That’s why it makes me so angry to see Democrats crush the businesses that are the very backbone and soul of our country with these unproven and unconstitutional lockdowns. With Democrats now in control of the White House and Congress, it’s more important than ever that we hold off the Left’s lockdowns and stand firm to save our small businesses. Republicans are the last line of defense for our small businesses and for the American Dream! That's why I started the Republican Defense Fund...because even though I am already fighting these policies in Washington, WE MUST TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY in Congress to make sure we can stop this once and for all! Thanks, Andrew Garbarino Sent from my iPhone \---------- forwarded message below ---------- From: Team Garbarino < > Date: Thurs. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats Hate Democracy
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_hate_democ&n=1)
---
Peter \-- We are going on 11 months of one man calling all the shots in St Paul. The legislature serves at his pleasure and their lawmaking powers only seem to exist to advance the liberal agenda - the Walz agenda. **[Merriam-Webster defines](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=qUgpfjzcuIHeIrCBIdh_GoIvYMDk9hCMmOVFjNNCIKLHYhlBAvT5EOxRARR19wD1G-MZB59qVm-VKIwIKqwxQw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_hate_democ&n=2) dictator as "a person granted absolute emergency power". Sound familiar?!** It's crystal clear that the modern Democrat party has no interest in democratic principles at this point. Yet they will lecture us on it and even tell us their form of socialism is "democratic socialism". I think we know what that would look like! Yesterday all 70 Democrats in the Minnesota House voted to protect Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. They voted to keep tyranny over our small businesses and personal lives. They voted against YOU!
### Here's the [vote](https://www.action4liberty.com/democrats_vote_to_protect_walz_powers_spit_on_democratic_process?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_hate_democ&n=3):
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/democrats_vote_to_protect_walz_powers_spit_on_democratic_process?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_hate_democ&n=4) These anti-democratic politicians are even working with Republicans on crafting a Fake End Walz' Powers bill, so they can claim to their voters that they are "doing something", while not solving the actual problem. Governor Walz must be sitting in his mansion right now, smiling behind his double mask. Minnesota Democrats are used to weak opposition in this state. They probably believe we'll just give up on this fight. After all, we're in a standstill.
## They have no clue!
The team at Action 4 Liberty will NOT QUIT. Our mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. That is a mission we cannot fail. **Stay tuned. We will be updating you on our operations in a couple days and announcing a big adjustment. Things are going to get much more serious for some Democrat legislators in the Minnesota House. We won't let them continue to erode away our system of government.** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates [January 29, 2021]
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- Newly elected DNC Chair, [Jaime Harrison](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=709cbe64ba&e=d6c5c7d7ec), was on [The Rachel Maddow Show](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=25f86e4e16&e=d6c5c7d7ec) this week. He communicated his vision for his role as Chair of the Democratic Party. “My job as the chair of the Democratic Party is to make sure we take [President Biden’s] successes, the promises he has made, that we make sure the folks down in small towns, in the cities, on dirt roads, understand those are promises that are kept. It is also my mission to make sure that Democrats build back better, and we have a strengthened party, in all 50 states, in our territories, that we can give him more help in terms of the house, the senate, in governor's mansions and state legislatures across the country.” It is no surprise that Jaime is fighting everywhere to get Democrats elected and to promote progressive policies that will benefit the people. He is a strong advocate and leader, who has worked to galvanize support on issues related to healthcare, the economy, climate change, and racial inequities. He, along with the rest of the Democratic Party, is working to ensure Democrats deliver on their promises. While the Republicans are dealing with conspiracy theorists, insurrectionists and the insurgency sympathizers within their ranks, Democrats have taken bold, progressive action. President Biden acted with the safety and well-being of the public in mind. He has secured the purchase of [200 million doses](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4cea4d07a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of COVID vaccines. He has signed several executive actions this week, overturning hostile policies enacted by Trump and his administration. The latest of these actions signed by the President, demonstrate a strong commitment by the Biden-Harris administration to build on the Affordable Care Act, meet needs created by the pandemic, reduce health care costs, protect access to reproductive care, and make our healthcare system easier to navigate and more equitable. The signing of this executive order comes just after the 48th anniversary of Roe v. Wade. This is a strong statement about the administration’s fervent commitment to protecting reproductive healthcare. The respect and dignity of workers continues to be a priority. Progressives are rallying behind Rep. Bobby Scott’s and Sen. Bernie Sanders’ [legislation to raise the minimum wage](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bcfe4ec187&e=d6c5c7d7ec). #RaiseTheWage and @fightfor15 are being pushed on social media by progressive groups. MoveOn, Teamsters, SEIU, and Sunrise are among the groups campaigning for the raise. Make no mistake the Republican Party has declared its allegiance to a defeated, deplatformed, and destructive narcissist and who is now exiled to a declining golf resort in Florida. However, instead of working with Democrats to have a functioning government, they are using underhanded tactics to delay and obstruct. Cabinet nominee, Alejandro Mayorkas, who received approval from the Senate Homeland Security committee, has yet to be confirmed as Homeland Security Secretary. Now, Republican Sen. John Cornyn has called for another unprecedented [confirmation hearing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6ce9d4da59&e=d6c5c7d7ec) by a different committee. Also distressing is the fact that [Xavier Becerra](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6d4811d708&e=d6c5c7d7ec), nominee for Health and Human Services Secretary, has not had a hearing scheduled even though the United States is in the midst of a “dark winter” in facing the coronavirus pandemic. Our nation has seen more than 430,000 deaths, but they have yet to confirm the nation’s top health official. In a process that was long overdue, the confirmations of [Janet Yellen](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=14a587a52f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) as Treasury Secretary and [Antony Blinken ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3ef3c7c4ef&e=d6c5c7d7ec)as Secretary of State have been solidified. These first-class leaders with impeccable credentials will restore the integrity of their respective offices. We will need their leadership to end divisive policies that have pitted Americans against each other and have made the world skeptical of America’s standing on the global stage. Finally, I would like to take a moment to honor the victims the Holocaust. This past Wednesday marked International Holocaust Remembrance Day. This solemn day serves as a reminder that we must relentlessly work to combat anti-semintism and bigotry. We must never forget the atrocities endured by so many and continue to tell their stories. It is our duty. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni

In this Update:
* President Biden’s Executive Orders

**Executive Orders:** Progresive Groups have praised President Biden’s executive orders to advance racial equity and support for underserved communities. NextGen America, AFSCME, Rep. Pramila Jayapal, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and the Young Democrats of America came out in support of President Biden’s order to end federal use of private prisons. The new orders will also recommit the federal government to respect tribal sovereignty and disavow discrimination against the Asian American and Pacific Islander community over the coronavirus pandemic. **Strengthening Americans’ access to quality, affordable healthcare** President Biden [reopened enrollment](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2e9eb82226&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on the federal Affordable Care Act exchanges. Under Trump, open enrollment was cut in half to six weeks. The new “Special Enrollment Period” will be from February 15, 2021 - May 15, 2021. This Special Enrollment Period will give Americans that need healthcare coverage during this global pandemic the opportunity to sign up. **President Biden will also direct agencies to reexamine:**
* Policies that undermine protections for people with preexisting conditions, including complications related to COVID-19.
* Demonstrations and waivers under Medicaid and the ACA that may reduce coverage or undermine the programs, including work requirements.
* Policies that undermine the Health Insurance Marketplace or other markets for health insurance.
* Policies that make it more difficult to enroll in Medicaid and ACA plans.
* Policies that reduce affordability of coverage or financial assistance.

**Tackling the climate crisis** President Biden took [executive action](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a9a4407f3e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to tackle the climate crisis at home and abroad while creating good-paying union jobs, building sustainable infrastructure, and delivering environmental justice. The actions include:
* Directing the federal government to conserve at least 30% of all federal land and water by 2030.
* Suspending new leases for natural gas and oil development on federal lands and waters to the extent possible.
* Prioritizing environmental justice by establishing a government-wide Justice40 initiative with the goal of delivering 40 percent of the overall benefits of relevant federal investments to disadvantaged communities.
* Making climate risks central to foreign policy and national security preparedness.

**Reversing transgender military ban** President Biden [repealed the ban](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=902139b700&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on transgender people serving openly in the military and ordered the defense secretary to “immediately prohibit involuntary separations, discharges and denials of reenlistment or continuation of service on the basis of gender identity or under circumstances relating to their gender identity.” **Reinstating Covid-19 travel restrictions** President Biden [reinstated Covid-19 travel restrictions](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ba8c8253dc&e=d6c5c7d7ec) affecting non-U.S. citizens traveling from Brazil and much of Europe, which Trump had scrapped days before his term ended. Additionally, the ban will bar most non-U.S. citizens from entry if they have recently been in South Africa, where a new strain of Covid-19 has been identified. **Promoting 'Buy American' agenda** In an effort to bolster American manufacturing, President Biden [signed an executive order](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d42a8148cc&e=d6c5c7d7ec) directing agencies to strengthen requirements about purchasing products and services from U.S. workers and businesses and to “close loopholes that allow companies to offshore production and jobs while still qualifying for domestic preferences.” **Evaluation of Trump’s housing policies** President Biden directed the Department of Housing and Urban Development to “examine the effects of the previous Administration’s regulatory actions that undermined fair housing policies and laws” and use its findings to implement the Fair Housing Act’s standards as needed. **End reliance on private prisons** In an effort to terminate the federal government’s use of privately owned detention facilities, the Attorney General [has been directed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bc5b437b42&e=d6c5c7d7ec) not to renew Department of Justice contracts with private prisons. **Executive order reaffirming commitment to tribal sovereignty** Emphasizing the administration’s commitment to respecting the sovereignty of American Indian and Alaska Native tribes, President Biden’s order [reaffirmed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=17c1c43d9a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) a Clinton-era policy mandating all department and agency heads regularly consult with tribal officials on policy matters that may affect them. **Executive order denouncing anti-Asian discrimination and xenophobia** In response to [a surge in anti-Asian bias](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d7b44dfec6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) amid the coronavirus pandemic, President Biden’s order urged the Department of Health and Human Services to consider issuing guidance on cultural competency and sensitivity toward Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders as part of the nation’s Covid-19 response. Additionally, the order directed the attorney general to work to prevent discrimination and hate crimes.

name: Becca Ellison, Evergreen Action
subject: Our first deadline of the Biden presidency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This is only the start.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ) Friend, Joe Biden's climate presidency is off to a strong start. We're back in the Paris Agreement, the federal government is committed to buying zero emission vehicles, and President Biden revoked the permit for the Keystone XL pipeline—actions that we and activists across the climate movement have spent months pushing for. But this is only the beginning. We have been working on bold climate plans that match the urgency of this moment. We won't make them a reality by simply patting ourselves on the back. We need to keep the pressure on to make sure the Biden administration continues to take quick, decisive action on climate. **Our first fundraising deadline of the Biden presidency is on Sunday, and we've set a bold end-of-month fundraising goal of $15,000. The funds we raise between now and our deadline on Sunday will go straight to our bold climate plans, including pushing climate to the center of next month's confirmation hearings and new policy papers that will go directly to the highest rungs of power.** **[Donate today to meet our $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and to ensure we can push climate to the top of Biden's agenda in his first 100 days.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1618?t=4&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1619?t=5&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1620?t=6&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1621?t=7&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1622?t=8&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1623?t=9&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1618?t=10&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---
Here are some of our goals coming up in February:
* **Confirmation Hearings:** Every agency must be a climate agency. The upcoming Senate hearings are crucial opportunities to make sure that the leaders of our federal departments understand the urgency—and the profound potential—of this moment. That's why we've released (and put in the hands of press and policymakers) climate policy priorities achievable by every agency. And it's already working: Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen referenced several ideas similar to our recommendations in her hearing.
* **Policy Memos:** We've published papers on offshore wind energy, equity mapping, and preventing the next economic crash through bold climate policy. The press and policymakers alike have been taking note—and there's a lot more where that came from.

**Our advocacy is working and showing up in the plans of policymakers from Congress to the Cabinet. But we can't let up now: Hitting our first fundraising deadline of the Biden presidency will keep our team going hard.**
**[Chip in to our $15,000 end-of month goal before our deadline on midnight Sunday to keep bold climate policy center stage at this month's confirmation hearings and at the top of policymakers' agendas.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1618?t=11&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)**
Thanks,
Becca Ellison
Policy Manager, Evergreen Action
[CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1618?t=12&akid=6316%2E53494%2EMVdXHJ)
---

Peter - do you have a second?

Our campaign has kicked into high gear and things are already moving VERY quickly.

_As this race continues, it will only get busier._

That’s why we want to check in with some of our biggest supporters like you. Sarah wants to hear about the issues that matter most to you. _**Will you take just 10 seconds**_ _**to fill out our issue survey?**_

**[WEIGH IN NOW](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=9cac0998ca86450b83f822e4ca34ae82&_e=P9S6xYQNh4Z1pSYYmQPBcJqZGYu7YfaUo6zL90nECkLmMFMoxBld5ON6ae5-ICyYVTOoAHpm5QYqphudPTogYJAiEA2XdkbRSMbxppB2QpHQO10QU5W6c_7u6fE8OXqwfIm0drX6tKUaaYwadDZz8GtXth43yxEfIyux8r_KG4NMVSoZV7-WLb2QjpCPv1q359qcy1td1_RoPnAFMt4leRJIwYXtz2L7MbhWGul47TlzISquEHHxtEChPagNy71-qejixHZCgzk2uXtGhUgJ7zOf7rTrw4DmSla2nni1pUDJbl2rABsdm3QxAtXTCSydaQ2ZOJUmsvIz_gLuOOEtG4u-ga5drUfa44zcf_1DEkRQWhmkFGJ7i5E1f_Nxn7c4neXWzKTuB6ZWCeD53MiZI9jVgp6lobU3wKMxRxJzeQoFrPiG4qgDPkaT4VImmujf45XyJUDRy5ttBLNmC9vuJmECUz02LKJp_YWihwR14kc%3D)**

Sarah believes strongly that our country needs leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient.
** **
Sarah will always:
* _Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny._
* _Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe. _
* _Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty._

_**She’s been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another**_ _**in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government.**_

Now that you know where Sarah stands, tell us what you think! Can you take our survey and let us know how you feel about some of the biggest issues facing our country?

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.
clean_body: we want to check in with some of our biggest supporters like you. Sarah wants to hear about the issues that matter most to you. | | Peter - do you have a second? Our campaign has kicked into high gear and things are already moving VERY quickly. As this race continues, it will only get busier. That’s why we want to check in with some of our biggest supporters like you. Sarah wants to hear about the issues that matter most to you. Will you take just 10 seconds to fill out our issue survey? Sarah believes strongly that our country needs leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient. Sarah will always: Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny. Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe. Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty. She’s been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government.** Now that you know where Sarah stands, tell us what you think! Can you take our survey and let us know how you feel about some of the biggest issues facing our country? Sarah and our campaign team will be reviewing the results, and we look forward to seeing what you say. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: The president should take executive action to broadly cancel student loan debt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
There's been a lot of talk about unity recently. For me, unity is about doing the work that the American people want done. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516f/45c30650/1c5e0b238/66eb68b4/2801885189/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There's been a lot of talk about unity recently.

For me, unity is about doing the work that the American people want done.

It's not about ideology. It's not about helping just the richest Americans or some interest group -- unity is about doing things that the American people want to see us do.

And you know one thing that unites Americans? Canceling student loan debt.

It's a hugely popular proposal that would immediately put hundreds and thousands of dollars back in the pockets of millions of Americans, start to close the racial wealth gap, and boost our economy.

And the president can get it done without waiting for Congress.

I'm partnering with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley to set a bold plan for how Joe Biden can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Americans and broadly cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt.

**[I need you to be a part of this effort-- because we can only get it done if we fight for it side by side as a grassroots movement. Add your name and join the fight to get this done.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516f/45c30650/1c5e0b238/66eb68b7/2801885189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210129_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We need to take action because families need relief. Over 40 million Americans are being crushed by over $1.5 trillion in federal student loan debt.

In the middle of an economy that's been badly hit by the pandemic, the student debt crisis acts like an anchor, preventing a swift recovery and restricting opportunity and prosperity for millions of American families.

Canceling student loan debt as soon as possible would mean substantial and immediate relief for tens of millions of Americans, many of whom have suddenly been laid off or are worried that their jobs are next.

And communities of color, which have been hit hardest by the health and economic consequences of the coronavirus pandemic, disproportionately bear the burden of student debt.

Black students are on average nearly 20 percentage points more likely to take out federal student loans. Half of Black borrowers and a third of Latino borrowers default on their loans within 20 years. Canceling student loan debt would increase wealth for Black and Latino families, help them avoid default, and start to close the racial wealth gap.

Economists agree that canceling student loan debt would also help boost our struggling economy through a consumer-driven economic stimulus, greater home-buying rates and housing stability, expanded access to more affordable financial products including car loans and mortgages, higher college completion rates, and greater small business formation. This is a no brainer for our economy.

Look: we all saw what happened in 2008. After the financial crisis, young people were shoved into a weak job market and plunged even deeper into student debt. And today, as workers face layoffs and frozen wages in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, student loan borrowers who were barely staying afloat are now drowning. When Americans can't fully participate in our economy, we see a ripple effect across our entire economy and a slowdown in economic growth. This affects all of us, including those of us who don't have student loans or have already paid off their student debt.

We can do better than this. And Democrats will.

**[Join the fight alongside me, Chuck Schumer, and Ayanna Pressley if you agree that the president should take executive action to broadly cancel student loan debt. Add your name now.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516f/45c30650/1c5e0b238/66eb68b7/2801885189/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210129_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516f/45c30650/1c5e0b238/66eb68b7/2801885189/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210129_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: John Fetterman
subject: A request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Today my team and I are setting our *first-ever* monthly fundraising goal.
#
You may have heard by now, Peter, but I’m taking a hard look at running to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.
I’ve got two huge factors to consider as I weigh this decision: The first is how it’ll affect my family and my kids — that’ll always be number one. _But the second is how much early, grassroots support we think we’ll be able to count on from folks like you._
**That’s why today my team and I are setting our *first-ever* monthly fundraising goal as I seriously consider entering this race.**
Launching a campaign the right way is an expensive, labor-intensive process — and frankly, it’s not the kind of thing I can pull off alone. That’s why I’m coming to you as we strive to build the kind of early momentum it’ll take to launch a campaign that can actually go the distance.
[Will you contribute $5 before Sunday at midnight if I can count on you to be in my corner from the get-go? Early donations go an especially long way in a race as high-profile as this one will be, so I hope you’ll consider chipping in.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1012?refcode=em20210129-79&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1012?refcode=em20210129-79&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f)**
Look Peter, I know times are tough right now. That’s why it’s so important to me that you know exactly what a contribution to our campaign means at this early stage.
Every bit of support that comes our way goes straight towards things like planning our organizing strategy, staffing up our core team, and running ads to grow the size and strength of our campaign. **And the honest truth is that a dollar today will have an outsized impact on what kind of campaign we’ll be able to launch.**
Pennsylvania is going to be home to the *most* important Senate race in 2022, and to win we’ll need to build a giant grassroots campaign to fight for every county and every vote.
[Our ability to hit the ground running depends heavily on whether we can hit our January goal, so please chip in $5 if you can swing it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1012?refcode=em20210129-79&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f)
We’re already all 67 counties strong. Let’s keep this going. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
TL;DR: Taking the leap into a race as high-stakes as this one isn’t a decision I’m taking lightly. It’s a decision I’m weighing alongside my wife Gisele, my three kids, and with supporters like you, Peter. Oh, and don’t forget Levi. [If you’re with me, please let me know by chipping in $5, or whatever you can, before this Sunday at midnight to help reach our first-ever monthly goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1012?refcode=em20210129-79&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210129-79-footer&t=25&refcode2=79_434096_aief5f&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=79%2E434096%2Eaief5f).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: Have you heard the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Have you heard the news?

**[President Biden named my good friend Congresswoman Deb Haaland to be his Secretary of the Interior.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")**

She will be the FIRST ever Native American Cabinet Secretary. I have no doubt she will be an amazing advocate for America's public lands and will diligently uphold U.S. treaties with Tribal Nations.

When I passed the Land Grant-Mercedes bill to protect our public lands in the House, Deb was right there with me.

When I worked to secure funding for our national parks, Deb helped me along the way.

**_[I'm personally asking our fellow Americans to show their support for Deb Haaland's nomination by signing my critical petition before midnight >> ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")_**

Here's what you need to know:

Deb Haaland's nomination needs to be approved by the Senate before it's official.

I know firsthand her commitment to the sanctity of our public lands because, like me, she has spent her entire career defending them.

But McConnell and Senate Republicans have spent years degrading our national parks, public lands, and relationships with Tribal Nations.

**[They know Rep. Haaland will finally hold them accountable, and they could try to block her nomination.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")** **[We can win this, but I need 24 more signatures from Cresco to show overwhelming support and secure Deb's nomination >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")**
---

I've watched Republicans prioritize oil profits over our public lands.

I've watched them try to build a border wall through sacred lands.

I've watched them strip $480 million from our National Park Service.

_But with Deb in the Interior, she will put an end to these injustices._

Now that I've officially been sworn in to the Senate, I am committed to doing everything I can to ensure her nomination is successful.

**[But I can't do it alone. I need an overwhelming surge of support for Deb and our public lands -- 10,000 signatures before midnight -- to show that Americans stand strong and united with Deb and with our national parks. Will you sign before midnight?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")**

**[SUPPORT DEB HAALAND NOW >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202011/858784918/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210129_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia_rem_rs")**
---

Thanks for your help,

Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202016/858784918/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202014/858784918/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b20200a/858784918/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202008/858784918/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is fighting in the Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b202009/858784918/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email_2021?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bca5/18e32a7f/48201512/7b20200f/858784918/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. clean_body: | | Have you heard the news? "" She will be the FIRST ever Native American Cabinet Secretary. I have no doubt she will be an amazing advocate for America's public lands and will diligently uphold U.S. treaties with Tribal Nations. When I passed the Land Grant-Mercedes bill to protect our public lands in the House, Deb was right there with me. When I worked to secure funding for our national parks, Deb helped me along the way. "" Here's what you need to know: Deb Haaland's nomination needs to be approved by the Senate before it's official. I know firsthand her commitment to the sanctity of our public lands because, like me, she has spent her entire career defending them. But McConnell and Senate Republicans have spent years degrading our national parks, public lands, and relationships with Tribal Nations. "" "" | "" I've watched Republicans prioritize oil profits over our public lands. I've watched them try to build a border wall through sacred lands. I've watched them strip $480 million from our National Park Service. But with Deb in the Interior, she will put an end to these injustices. Now that I've officially been sworn in to the Senate, I am committed to doing everything I can to ensure her nomination is successful. "" "" Thanks for your help, Ben Ray "" "" "" "" Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is fighting in the Senate to build a better future for all families. Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources. As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? "" We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com_. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. subject: Rep. Mann Committee Assignments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
I ran so I could fight to make America stronger and to do everything possible to make sure our greatest days are still ahead. | | |
---
| | Friends,

This week I secured my committee assignments for the 117th Congress of the U.S. House of Representatives. I am honored to be selected to serve on the House Agriculture Committee and the House Veterans Affairs Committee.

Both have a significant impact on the lives of Kansans. I pledge to work hard to ensure sound judgment and Kansas common sense are front and center as I serve on these two committees.

I did not run for Congress to be a caretaker in the slow decline of our great nation - I ran so I could fight to make America stronger and to do everything possible to make sure our greatest days are still ahead. I pledge to stand up for our Veterans while advocating for agriculture and our conservative Kansas values.
---
|
---
| Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---

Peter — We hope you’ve had a great start to 2021! It’s hard to believe February 1st is **_right_** around the corner. As we look toward next month, we shift our focus to campaign planning. Thought out, solid plans are essential to a successful campaign, and as 2020 taught us, being ready to adapt those plans is _crucial_! _Thankfully, we KNOW you’re a lot quicker on your feet than these three:_ | [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoibnFjcTBxMzg4NGZkbGRsajY3OW4iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUU1vWjNVajJIQS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kcmlwXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1Zb3VyK1dlZWtseStUTCUzQkRSK0Rvd25sb2FkIn0)

With that in mind — if you follow our February programming, by the end of the month you’ll have built communication, digital, field, and fundraising plans for your campaign!
And you’ll be prepared to adapt those plans as needed.
**Amazing, right?**
Let’s get planning!
— The NDTC Team
_Please note: Our virtual offices will be closed on February 1._
